impact: This advances the PP&D plan by making the public source inventory actionable: validation can now identify authoritative permit family categories that still need deterministic process fixtures before live crawling or authenticated DevHub automation expands.
summary: Add a validation-only PP&D source coverage gap report for permit families without fixture-backed process models.
target_task: Task checkbox-84: Add a validation-only source coverage gap report that compares permit-process fixtures against public source inventory categories and reports which PP&D permit families still lack fixture-backed process models.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
